name: Agent Orchestrator
description: Control and monitor Agent Orchestrator (AO) from OpenClaw. Slash commands, AI tools, issue board scanning, proactive planning, and health monitoring.

aoPath.description: Path to the ao CLI binary. Defaults to 'ao' (found via PATH).

aoCwd.description: Working directory for ao commands. Must contain agent-orchestrator.yaml. Defaults to the current working directory.

healthPollIntervalMs.description: How often to poll AO health in milliseconds. Default: 30000 (30s). Set to 0 to disable.

boardScanIntervalMs.description: How often to scan the issue board for changes in milliseconds. Default: 1800000 (30min). Set to 0 to disable.

ghPath.description: Path to the gh CLI binary. Defaults to 'gh' (found via PATH).

aoCwd.label: AO working directory
aoCwd.help: Path to the directory containing agent-orchestrator.yaml. Required — most commands fail without this.

aoPath.label: AO CLI path
aoPath.help: Leave empty to use 'ao' from PATH

healthPollIntervalMs.label: Health poll interval (ms)
healthPollIntervalMs.help: Set to 0 to disable health monitoring

boardScanIntervalMs.label: Board scan interval (ms)
boardScanIntervalMs.help: How often to scan for new issues. Default 30min. Set to 0 to disable.

ghPath.label: GitHub CLI path
ghPath.help: Leave empty to use 'gh' from PATH
